message:
feat(discovery): implement multi-factor trending algorithm

Add trending and discovery algorithm for Swap Meet community prompts:

- trending.ts: Multi-factor scoring (views 25%, copies 30%, saves 15%,
  rating 20%, freshness 10%) with exponential time decay (4-week half-life)
- recommendations.ts: Content-based recommendations using tag similarity,
  category affinity, and collaborative signals
- index.ts: Public exports for the discovery module

Update Swap Meet page to use new trending sort instead of views-only.

All 28 Swap Meet E2E tests pass.

Resolves: xjfe

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,9 @@
+/**
+ * Discovery Module
+ *
+ * Provides trending and recommendation algorithms for the Swap Meet
+ * community prompts marketplace.
+ */
+
+export * from "./trending";
+export * from "./recommendations";
